name: chuk-analyzer
description: Firefox extension that identifies the technologies running on any website.

scripts.build: npm run build:db && web-ext build --overwrite-dest -i node_modules .cache scripts package.json package-lock.json web-ext-artifacts .git .gitignore README.md
scripts.lint: web-ext lint -i node_modules .cache scripts package.json package-lock.json web-ext-artifacts .git .gitignore README.md
scripts.start: web-ext run -i node_modules .cache scripts package.json package-lock.json web-ext-artifacts .git .gitignore README.md
